products.name: ARBOREA

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025‑04‑22 report explicitly recommends ARBOREA and CARREFOUR CLASSIC as top choices for latte, based on laboratory tests and price‑quality comparison. The evidence is fresh, published within the last 60 days.
